title: rubus lawtonii
intro: Rubus lawtonii, also known as Lawton's blackberry, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus lawtonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus lawtonii are typically made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues.
